{{Quote|If we can't have it, no one can.|The Ossiki Confederacy's leader, on access to food|<ref name="Characters" />}}
The '''Ossiki Confederacy Army''' was a military unit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toydaria/Legends|Toydaria]]<ref name="Characters" /> in the intersection of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] portion of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The [[Army/Legends|army]] served the [[Ossiki Confederacy]]<ref name="Characters" /> and regularly fought in the [[Toydarian seasonal wars]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|427|Ossiki Confederacy Army}}</ref> a cyclical conflict driven by the creation of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] shortages by Toydaria's climate. The Ossiki Confederacy's [[Ossiki's leader|leader]] once declared that none of their enemies should have access to food if they could not have it.<ref name="Characters" />

Under this directive, the Ossiki Confederacy Army used chemical [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] to [[Poison/Legends|poison]]<ref name="Characters" /> and destroy the supplies<ref name="CSWE" /> of rival confederacies,<ref name="Characters" /> becoming infamous for doing so.<ref name="CSWE" /> During one of the wars caused by drought, the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] joined the Ossiki Confederacy Army in his youth and received a broken left [[Tooth/Legends|tusk]] and a lame [[Limb/Legends|leg]] during the conflict. After the drought subsided and the war ended,<ref name="Characters" /> Watto mustered out of the army<ref name="CSWE Watto">{{CSWECite|III|322|Watto}}</ref> by approximately [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].<ref name="Watto date">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] states that [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] was present on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] not long after [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] arrived there when he was roughly three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old. The book also states that Skywalker was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]]. Therefore, Watto must have left the Ossiki Confederacy Army by approximately [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Ossiki Confederacy Army was first mentioned in Watto's [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry on [[StarWars.com]], published by [[2001]].<ref name="Databank">{{DB|character|watto|Watto}}</ref>
